name: TunTun Sahur: Super Runner Game
description: TunTun Sahur: Super Runner Game – Ready to have fun running with TunTun Sahur? In this hyper-casual runner, race down an endless highway ‍ with a single goal: reach the finish line alive! Endless Random Challenges Police ‍ and cash appear completely at random every run. No two levels are ever the same—every step brings a new surprise! Powerful Upgrades Collect coins to enhance three core upgrades: Coin Earnings, Starting Health Points, and the +Health Multiplier Gate. Become stronger and faster with every run!
instructions: Survive to Reach the Finish Line If your health drops below 1 0 it rsquo s game over Dodge enemy attacks or take them out by colliding when necessary and make it to the finish line in one piece
